steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The prompt is explicit: the student wants to indicate the year Yosemite Falls was completed. This is the decisive requirement. Any choice missing the year fails the objective.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choices
steps.content: C states the painting's title with the completion year 1930. Choices A, B, and D mention other details from the notes but omit the essential year. That matches choice C — C is correct.
